nl_query: For each question paper, show the paper title, total marks, number of leaf questions, number of answer key rubrics defined, number of preparers, approval status, and the name of the user who approved it.
failed_sql:
SELECT qp.title, qp.total_marks, COUNT(DISTINCT q.id) AS num_leaf_questions, COUNT(DISTINCT akr.question_id) AS num_answer_key_rubrics, COUNT(DISTINCT ak.preparer_id) AS num_preparers, ak.approval_status, app_user.display_name AS approver_name
FROM   question_paper qp
JOIN   board b ON b.qp_id = qp.id
JOIN   evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.board_id = b.id AND ea.is_active = TRUE
JOIN   answer_key ak ON ak.qp_id = qp.id AND ak.status = 'APPROVED'
JOIN   answer_key_rubric akr ON akr.answer_key_id = ak.id
JOIN   app_user ON app_user.id = ak.approved_by
JOIN   question q ON q.qp_id = qp.id AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM question q2 WHERE q2.parent_question_id = q.id)
GROUP BY qp.title, qp.total_marks, ak.approval_status, app_user.display_name
error: Validation failed (schema): Column 'akp.preparer_id' does not exist. Verify that the column is defined on the table referenced by its alias prefix, or that the alias prefix matches a table declared in FROM/JOIN.
